"use client"; // src/useInfiniteQuery.ts import { InfiniteQueryObserver } from "@tanstack/query-core"; import { useBaseQuery } from "./useBaseQuery.js"; function useInfiniteQuery(options, queryClient) { return useBaseQuery( options, InfiniteQueryObserver, queryClient ); } export { useInfiniteQuery }; //# sourceMappingURL=useInfiniteQuery.js.map
